scenario.name: reg
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:localhost SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[user]@localhost>;tag=[call_id] To: <sip:[user]@localhost> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[user]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 60 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:localhost SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[user]@localhost>;tag=[call_id] To: <sip:[user]@localhost> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[user]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> [authentication] Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 60 Content-Length: 0
